calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Settlement
Off Calendar Apr-10-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paul Perdue, esq., via Zoom, for Gloria Wong Avera, Trustee.

At the court's query, Mr. Perdue reports on the status of the settlement agreement. The court suggests taking the matter off calendar and suggests that the parties are free to file a formal Petition to Approve Settlement, if needed. No objection to the court's suggestion is presented.

The Status of Settlement is taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods/Ateesh Datt. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Settlement
Off Calendar Apr-05-2023 Continued To Apr-10-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Settlement
Off Calendar Mar-28-2023 Continued To Apr-05-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Settlement
Off Calendar Jan-31-2023 Continued To Mar-28-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances via Zoom: Kristofer Biorn, Esq. for Jacqueline Kwan (Former Trustee; incapacitated; per Mr. Biorn). Paul Perdue, Esq. for and with Gloria Avera, Jeannette Wong, Kathleen Wong, and Christopher Wong (Beneficiaries of the trust).

The Court stated that the matter is on for status on the settlement. Mr. Biorn stated that he hasn't had contact with his client or her husband, that he will file a motion to be relieved as counsel, that this matter is on for status of the settlement, and that the underlying petition was previously taken off calendar. Mr. Perdue stated that his clients had signed the settlement and that the successor trustee would be Christopher Wong. The Court and counsel confer on how to proceed. Mr. Biorn stated that they could obtain an order to substitute in a successor trustee and that he could inform his client's husband that he was substituting out as counsel. Mr. Purdue stated that the settlement was documented, that they were hoping to get Ms. Kwan's husband to sign as her agent, and that Mr. Kwan can sign on behalf of his wife as a beneficiary. Mr. Biorn stated that he could send an email to his client's husband informing him that this is still being negotiated and that he should pursue the settlement. Mr. Perdue stated that they could refile the petition and substitute his client, Christopher Wong, in as the successor trustee. Brief additional discussions are held. Mr. Perdue stated that he could submit an ex parte to substitute in the successor trustee.

At the conclusion of discussions, today's hearing on the status of settlement is continued to March 28, 2023, at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. The Court stated that it will be looking for an ex parte to be filed to substitute in the successor trustee. The Court noted that it is hoping that this matter can be taken off calendar at the next calling.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Jackie Alameda/Ateesh Datt. Deputy: Pleigo. Not reported.

Petition Of Beneficiaries To Remove Trustee, To Appoint Successor Trustee, And For Accounting
Off Calendar Dec-27-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paul Perdue, via Zoom, for Christopher Wong, Kathlene Wong, Gloria Wong Avera, and Jeannette Wong Gee, Petitioners; Paul Perdue, specially appearing for Kristofer Biorn, for Jacqueline Kwan, Trustee.

Mr. Purdue reports that his clients have executed the settlement agreement, but that it requires Trustee's signature and opposing counsel intends to work on cleaning-up the agreement once he returns from vacation as the agreement has multiple signature pages. The court reminds counsel of how long this matter has been pending and asks him to advise opposing counsel to prioritize resolving this matter.

The Petition of Beneficiaries to Remove Trustee, etc., and Status of Accounting are taken of calendar in open court. The Status of Settlement is continued to Jan-31-2023 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Vedica Puri. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Settlement
Off Calendar Dec-27-2022 Continued To Jan-31-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Accounting
Off Calendar Dec-27-2022 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Oct-18-2022 Off Calendar

Petition Of Beneficiaries To Remove Trustee, To Appoint Successor Trustee, And For Accounting
Off Calendar Oct-18-2022 Continued To Dec-27-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kristofer Biorn, via Zoom, for Jacqueline Kwan, Trustee; Paul Perdue, via Zoom, for Christopher Wong, Kathlene Wong, Gloria Wong Avera, and Jeannette Wong Gee, Beneficiaries.

Mr. Purdue reports that a calendaring oversight caused him to miss the last hearing in this matter and apologizes to the court accordingly. Mr. Perdue advises that with the exception of Mr. Biorn's client, all parties have signed the settlement agreement which resolves all issues in this matter. The court confirms that a petition for approval of settlement is not likely and asks if the underlying petition should be taken off calendar. Mr. Perdue requests that the petition remain on calendar while he and Mr. Biorn meet and confer to determine who will be signing the settlement agreement on behalf of the Trustee, who lacks capacity to do so. Mr. Biorn reports of possibly filing a Motion to be Relieved as Counsel. The court encourages counsel to meet and confer regarding finalizing the settlement agreement.

After additional discussion, the Order to Appear is taken off calendar. All remaining subjects are continued to Dec-27-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

Petition Of Beneficiaries To Remove Trustee, To Appoint Successor Trustee, And For Accounting
Off Calendar Aug-30-2022 Continued To Oct-18-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kristofer Biorn, via Zoom, for Jacqueline Kwan, Trustee.

The court notes that Mr. Perdue is not present this morning. Mr. Biorn reports that he has made attempts to contact Mr. Perdue but that he has not replied. The court notes that the Trustee needs to approve the settlement.

An Order to Appear will be issued to Attorney Paul Perdue to appear on Oct-18-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear. The subject matters are also continued to that date.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Accounting
Off Calendar Jul-12-2022 Continued To Aug-30-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition Of Beneficiaries To Remove Trustee, To Appoint Successor Trustee, And For Accounting
Off Calendar Jul-12-2022 Continued To Aug-30-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kristofer Biorn, via Zoom, for Jacqueline Kwan, Trustee; Paul Perdue, via Zoom, for Christopher Wong, Kathlene Wong, Gloria Wong Avera, and Jeannette Wong Gee, Beneficiaries.

Mr. Perdue reports that a settlement agreement is circulating, and all beneficiaries have agreed to sign it. Mr. Biorn reports as to Ms. Kwan's lack of capacity to continue to act as Trustee but since the matter is almost completed, he suggested to Mr. Perdue to continue with formalizing the settlement and that Ms. Kwan's agent would sign the agreement on her behalf. Mr. Perdue advises that he intends to request to withdraw his petition as soon as the settlement has been signed. Mr. Biorn reiterates that in light of his client's lack of capacity, he will have her agent sign the settlement agreement or will file a petition for approval if needed. The court advises counsel that at this time, it is not affirming that his client's agent sign the settlement agreement.

The two matters set for hearing are continued to Aug-30-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. A Status of Settlement is set for the same date.

Judge: Hon. Cecilia Castellanos. Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Bastain. Not Reported.

Petition Of Beneficiaries To Remove Trustee, To Appoint Successor Trustee, And For Accounting
Off Calendar May-17-2022 Continued To Jul-12-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kristofer Biorn, via Zoom, for Jacqueline Kwan, Trustee; Paul Perdue, via Zoom, for Christopher Wong, Kathlene Wong, Gloria Wong Avera, and Jeannete Wong Gee, Petitioners.

Mr. Biorn reports that a global settlement is currently being drafted and expects to have a copy to Mr. Perdue by next week. Mr. Perdue confirms that the Trustee has complied with the order issued by the court on Jan-20-2022. The court advises that the order Requiring Trustee to Account or Alternatively to Appear Regarding Status of Accounting is discharged in open court.

The matters are continued to Jul-12-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Gomez. Not Reported.

Petition Of Beneficiaries To Remove Trustee, To Appoint Successor Trustee, And For Accounting
Off Calendar Jan-11-2022 Continued To Mar-22-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paul Perdue, via ZOOM, for Christopher Wong, via ZOOM, Kathleen Wong, Gloria Wong Avera, and Jeannette Wong, Beneficiaries.

The court confirms with Mr. Purdue that he received an email from Cynthia Lee advising him that she has withdrawn but that he has not provided notice to her. The court instructs Mr. Purdue to provide Ms. Lee with notice. Mr. Purdue reports that he has received exhibits and letters from Ms. Kwan regarding distributions but that he has not heard from her since he filed his petition to remove her as Trustee. The court states that it is ordering Ms. Kwan to account for the dates from Mar-31-2019 to Mar-31-2021 and instructs Mr. Purdue to submit a proposed order thereon. Mr. Purdue advises that he believes that Ms. Kwan may have dementia and may not be able to proceed.

After additional discussion, the Petition to Remove Trustee, etc., is continued to Mar-22-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. A Status of Accounting is set for the same date.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: G. Bastain. Not reported.

Petition For Instructions To List And Sell Real Property
Off Calendar Aug-29-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kristofer Biorn for Petitioner.

Mr. Biorn stated that he is not anticipating any objectors to appear, that they are now represented by Counsel and that they have entered into a stipulation regarding sale of the property. The Court granted the Petition for Instructions to List and Sell Real Property (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Gomez. Not reported.
